problem id: 66c8c3df
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND SHR(3)

examples:
  01010000 -> 00000000
  10100011 -> 00000100
  01110100 -> 00000000
  11000000 -> 00000000
  11111011 -> 00001111
  00111001 -> 00000100
  01101011 -> 00001101
  01001011 -> 00001001
  01101110 -> 00001001
  10101000 -> 00000000

query: 01100101
predicted answer: 00000100
